Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Joel D. Adler, Esq,m for Plaintiff Morrison & Foerster, LLP, Plaintiff and Moving Party
Dave Bunim, Esq., for SSF Investments, LLC, Defendant and Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Morrison & Foerster, LLP's Application for Writ of Attachment is denied. The court does not find that there is a substantial probability that Plaintiff will prevail as to Defendant SSF Investments, LLC. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
